title: Implementation; trust accounts
doc_html:
§97.  Implementation; trust accounts

The provisions of this Part regarding the implementation of site-specific trust accounts shall not be implemented until the rules and regulations pertaining to such trust accounts are finally adopted.

Acts 1993, No. 404, §2.
doc_text:
§97.  Implementation; trust accounts
The provisions of this Part regarding the implementation of site-specific trust accounts shall not be implemented until the rules and regulations pertaining to such trust accounts are finally adopted.
Acts 1993, No. 404, §2.
